pages.title: Soft horror
pages.text: Surround double wool souls with leather curtain walls — recipe is $(bold)shaped$(warn). Memorize the mantra:$(br2)LLLL / LWWL / LWWL / LLLL

pages.title: Why shaped matters
pages.text: Misplaced leather yields nothing — treat it like Botania's floral obsession with positional purity.
